# ScoreLead

> AI lead generation software for discovering, scoring, enriching, and contacting qualified B2B company leads.

Site: https://scorelead.io
Contact: hello@scorelead.io
Languages: English, Portuguese, Spanish

## Product

ScoreLead helps B2B companies, sales teams, agencies, and growth operators turn target markets into qualified account pipeline.

Core workflow:

- Discover companies by region, industry, keyword, or target account profile.
- Enrich company leads from websites, maps, and public web sources.
- Score prospects across reach, trust, fit, engagement, and readiness.
- Generate personalized multi-step outreach in multiple languages.
- Track leads from discovery through conversion.
- Export CRM-ready lead data.

## Key Pages

- English: https://scorelead.io
- Portuguese: https://scorelead.io/pt
- Spanish: https://scorelead.io/es
- Sitemap: https://scorelead.io/sitemap.xml

- B2B lead generation software

- B2B account discovery
